channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-07
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 64°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); period too short (5.2 sec). Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 62°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (5.3 sec). Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt WNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 66°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 67°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 1 kt NE, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (6.0 sec); wind direction off (NE). Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt ESE, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (ESE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.9 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 64°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.9 ft); period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 62°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (5.3 sec).
  • Fri 2026-07-03: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt WNW, water 63°F. Low tide: 04:07, 16:04. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-04: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 66°F. Low tide: 04:41, 16:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-05: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 67°F. Low tide: 05:15, 17:26. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 1 kt NE, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (6.0 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt ESE, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (ESE).
